name: Grey Evil Eye
description: Protection never looked this good. The Evil Eye motif in white, gold, and blue beads on a charcoal snapback.

name: Red Fox
description: A crimson bird in flight across a deep red canvas. Beaded wings spread across the crown.

name: Orange Geometric
description: Sacred geometry in yellow and black. A butterfly-like symmetry on bright citrus.

name: Blue Bird
description: Tropical birds perched among candles. Vibrant blue with a story stitched in every bead.
